name: @agentrux/openclaw-plugin
description: AgenTrux ingress + tools for OpenClaw — Agent-to-Agent authenticated Pub/Sub

commandTopicId.description: Topic ID to monitor for incoming commands

resultTopicId.description: Topic ID to publish results to

agentId.description: OpenClaw agent ID for processing (e.g. agentrux-rpa)

excludeOwnEvents.description: Skip events produced by this Script (server-side `?exclude_self=true`). Required when command and result topics overlap (read+write the same topic) to prevent self-echo loops.

resumeFromLastSeq.description: When false (default), every gateway start skips to the latest event so backlog accumulated while offline is not replayed (chat-style workloads). Set true only for durable consumer-group semantics where every event since shutdown must be processed.

execPolicy.description: Controls exec tool availability for the ingress agent

messagingTopics.description: Loosely-coupled messaging topics (independent of the command/result pair)

mode.description: Access mode: read, write, or readwrite

listen.description: Start SSE listener for real-time push (default: false, pull-only)
